mxCell.value: Hotel Reservation System — Class Diagram
Generalization (Inheritance)
Composition (filled diamond)
Aggregation (open diamond)
Association (directed)
Dependency / uses
+ public - private # protected ~ package
«abstract» Person
- personId: String - firstName: String - lastName: String - email: String - phone: String - dateOfBirth: Date
+ getFullName(): String + getContactInfo(): String + updateProfile(info): void
- guestId: String - loyaltyPoints: int - loyaltyTier: enum {SILVER,GOLD,PLATINUM} - preferredRoomType: String - idDocumentNo: String
+ makeReservation(room, dates): Reservation + cancelReservation(resId): boolean + viewReservationHistory(): List + earnLoyaltyPoints(amount): void
«abstract» Staff
- staffId: String - department: String - salary: double - hireDate: Date - employmentStatus: enum {ACTIVE,ON_LEAVE,TERMINATED}
+ checkIn(reservation): void + checkOut(reservation): void + generateReport(): Report + assignRoom(guest, room): void
- adminLevel: int - accessPermissions: List<String> - lastLoginDate: DateTime
+ manageRooms(): void + manageStaff(): void + viewAllReservations(): List + configureSystem(settings): void + generateFinancialReport(): Report
- shiftStart: Time - shiftEnd: Time - currentDesk: int
+ processCheckIn(res): void + processCheckOut(res): Invoice + handleGuestRequest(req): void + issueDoorKey(roomNo): String + collectPayment(inv): void
- zone: String - tasksCompleted: int - currentTaskId: String
+ cleanRoom(roomNo): void + reportIssue(roomNo, desc): void + markRoomReady(roomNo): void + requestSupplies(items): void
- hotelId: String - name: String - starRating: int - totalRooms: int - checkInTime: Time - checkOutTime: Time
+ getAvailableRooms(dates): List + addRoom(room): void + removeRoom(roomId): void + getOccupancyRate(): double
- street: String - city: String - state: String - country: String - postalCode: String - latitude: double - longitude: double
+ getFormattedAddress(): String + validate(): boolean
- roomId: String - roomNumber: String - floor: int - status: enum {AVAILABLE,OCCUPIED,MAINTENANCE,CLEANING} - isSmokingAllowed: boolean - maxOccupancy: int
+ isAvailable(checkIn, checkOut): boolean + setStatus(status): void + getStatus(): RoomStatus + getPricePerNight(): double + getRoomType(): RoomType
- typeId: String - typeName: enum {SINGLE,DOUBLE,SUITE,DELUXE,PENTHOUSE} - basePrice: double - description: String - amenities: List<String> - bedType: String
+ getPrice(season): double + getAmenityList(): List + updateBasePrice(price): void

- reservationId: String - bookingRef: String - checkInDate: Date - checkOutDate: Date - numGuests: int - status: enum {PENDING,CONFIRMED,CHECKED_IN,CHECKED_OUT,CANCELLED} - createdAt: DateTime - specialRequests: String
+ confirm(): void + cancel(): boolean + getTotalNights(): int + calculateTotalCost(): double + extendStay(newDate): void
«abstract» Payment
- paymentId: String - amount: double - currency: String - paymentDate: DateTime - status: enum {PENDING,SUCCESS,FAILED,REFUNDED} - transactionId: String
+ processPayment(): boolean + refund(amount): boolean + getReceipt(): String
- invoiceId: String - invoiceNo: String - issueDate: DateTime - dueDate: Date - subtotal: double - taxAmount: double - discountAmount: double - totalAmount: double - isPaid: boolean
+ generatePDF(): File + applyDiscount(pct): void + calculateTax(rate): double + markAsPaid(): void
- notifId: String - type: enum {EMAIL,SMS,PUSH} - recipient: String - subject: String - body: String - sentAt: DateTime - isDelivered: boolean
+ send(): boolean + retry(): void + getDeliveryStatus(): String
«abstract» Task
+ assign(staffId): void + markComplete(): void + escalate(): void
- cardNumber: String - cardHolderName: String - expiryDate: String - cvv: String - cardType: enum {VISA,MASTERCARD,AMEX}
+ processPayment(): boolean + validateCard(): boolean + tokenize(): String
- cashReceived: double - changeGiven: double - receivedBy: String
+ processPayment(): boolean + calculateChange(): double + printReceipt(): void
- gatewayName: String - gatewayTransactionId: String - authCode: String - paymentToken: String
+ processPayment(): boolean + initiateRefund(): boolean + verifyWebhook(payload): boolean
- taskType: enum {CLEANING,TURNDOWN,LINEN} - roomNo: String - suppliesNeeded: List<String> - estimatedDuration: int
+ markComplete(): void + requestSupplies(): void + flagForInspection(): void
+ markComplete(): void + orderParts(parts): void + escalateToCritical(): void
paid via
«uses»
